title: Temmie's Origins
description: Vanilla+ modpack focused around Origins, Exploration, and End-game Bosses!
body:
_**Origins exploration modpack focused around new biomes, bosses, and more!**_ **FEATURES**
**✔️ Origins & Origins++ !**
**✔️ Oh The Biomes You'll Go World Generation**
**✔️ BetterEnd & BetterNether & BetterX Generation!**
**✔️ Biome Makeover Generation!**
**✔️ New Bosses and Mobs courtesy of AdventureZ**
**✔️ Waystones and a ton QoL Features!**
**✔️ Support for Glams via Cosmetic Armor and Cosmetica!**
**✔️ Built-in Voice Chat via Plasmo Voice**
**✔️ Packaged Shader Support!**
Mod Credits - [AdventureZ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/adventurez) (by [Globox_Z](https://www.curseforge.com/members/33848116-globox_z?username=globox_z)) - [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) (by [Ryan Liptak](https://modrinth.com/user/squeek502)) - _This modpack was made for a group of friends looking for a fun Vanilla+ Minecraft experience._
_As such changes may seem a bit more all over the place~_ _Want to setup a server? Checkout our [Codeberg](https://codeberg.org/ribbon-studios/temmies-origins-modpack#setting-up-a-server) for instructions!_
